reasoning: This session targets lactate clearance and builds a stronger aerobic base. Given your recent ride data, we'll boost your intensity to better handle climbs like on the Alpine Loop. We aim to reduce your power drop-off over longer efforts, critical for tackling the key segment in target conditions.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Over-Unders: Alternate 3 mins at 209-218W with 2 mins at 242-249W. Repeat for 45 minutes.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
